zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Thomas Bland於1528年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德奧爾頓時，他的父親Robert Roger Bland26歲，母親Anne Pepper23歲。他於1551年11月8日與Joan Atkyns在英國英格蘭倫敦結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1560年在英國倫敦被列為sergeant skinner to queen elizabeth.。他去世於1594年5月5日在英國越可爾享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam Thomas Bland于1528年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德奧爾頓时，他的父亲Robert Roger Bland26岁，母亲Anne Pepper23岁。他于1551年11月8日与Joan Atkyns在英国英格兰倫敦结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1560年在英国倫敦被列为sergeant skinner to queen elizabeth.。他去世于1594年5月5日在英国越可爾享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Bland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place called Bland in Sedburgh, Yorkshire, the origin of which is uncertain. Possibly it is from Old English (ge)bland ‘storm, commotion’ (from blandan ‘to blend or mingle’), with reference to its exposed situation. The modern English adjective bland did not come into English (from Latin) until the 15th century, and is therefore unlikely to have given rise to surnames.
French: nickname from Old French blant ‘flattering’ (from Latin blandus).

variants.name: Blandin
meanings: Altered form of   Blanding  , a surname of English origin.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Thomas Bland was born in 1528, in Orton, Westmorland, England, his father, Robert Roger Bland, was 26 and his mother, Anne Pepper, was 23. He married Joan Atkyns on 8 November 1551, in London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. In 1560, at the age of 32, his occupation is listed as sergeant skinner to queen elizabeth. in London, England. He died on 5 May 1594, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Thomas Bland est né en 1528, à Orton, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Robert Roger Bland, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anne Pepper, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joan Atkyns le 8 novembre 1551, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. En 1560, à l’âge de 32 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sergeant skinner to queen elizabeth. à Londres, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 5 mai 1594, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Thomas Bland 1528 in Orton, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Roger Bland 26 und seine Mutter Anne Pepper 23. Er hat am 8. November 1551 in London, England, United Kingdom Joan Atkyns geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1560, als er 32 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sergeant skinner to queen elizabeth. in London, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. Mai 1594 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Thomas Bland è nato il nel 1528 nel Orton, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Robert Roger Bland, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Anne Pepper, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Joan Atkyns il 8 novembre 1551, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1560, all'età di 32 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sergeant skinner to queen elizabeth. nel London, England. Morì il 5 maggio 1594, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Thomas Blandが1528年にイギリスウエストモーランドオルトンで生まれた時，父Robert Roger Blandは26歳，母Anne Pepperは23歳であった。1551年11月8日にイギリスイギリスロンドンでJoan Atkynsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1560年，32歳の時，イギリスロンドンでの職業はsergeant skinner to queen elizabeth.と記録されている。彼は1594年5月5日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Thomas Bland(이)가 1528년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 오턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Roger Bland(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Pepper(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1551년 11월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 Joan Atkyns(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1560년, 32세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 런던에서 sergeant skinner to queen elizabeth.이었다. 그는 1594년 5월 5일 영국 요르크실르에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Thomas Bland nasceu em 1528, em Orton, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Roger Bland, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anne Pepper, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Atkyns em 8 de novembro de 1551, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1560, com 32 anos, sua profissão aparece como sergeant skinner to queen elizabeth. em London, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 5 de maio de 1594, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Thomas Bland родился в 1528 г. в местности ортон, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Roger Bland было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Pepper, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Atkyns 8 ноября 1551 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1560 году, в возрасте 32 лет,  он работал по профессии sergeant skinner to queen elizabeth. в местности Лондон, Англия. Он умер 5 мая 1594 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam Thomas Bland nació en 1528, en Orton, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Roger Bland, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Anne Pepper, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Joan Atkyns el 8 de noviembre de 1551, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1560, a la edad de 32 años, su ocupación registrada era sergeant skinner to queen elizabeth. en London, Inglaterra. Murió el 5 de mayo de 1594, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
